# Task implementation for path completion and REPL (2026-03-13 10:37Z)

_**User**_

Implement Task 6 and Task 7 from docs/plans/2026-03-13-tab-completion-impl-plan.md.

**Task 6: 路径补全接入 Rc<RefCell<Vfs>>**
- DevShellHelper must hold Rc<RefCell<Vfs>> so when kind == Path we can do path completion. Add a field to DevShellHelper: vfs: Rc<RefCell<Vfs>>. Add constructor DevShellHelper::new(vfs: Rc<RefCell<Vfs>>).
- In Completer::complete, when ctx.kind == Path: (1) resolve parent path from prefix: if prefix contains '/', parent = prefix before last '/', else parent = "."; (2) vfs.borrow().resolve_to_absolute(parent) to get abs_parent; (3) vfs.borrow().list_dir(&abs_parent) to get names (ignore errors, return empty list); (4) complete_path(&ctx.prefix, &names) and return Ok((ctx.start, path_candidates)).
- You need use std::cell::RefCell; use std::rc::Rc; and optionally crate::vfs::Vfs in completion.rs.

**Task 7: REPL 分支 TTY / 非 TTY**
- main.rs: (1) After loading vfs, wrap it: let vfs = Rc::new(RefCell::new(vfs)); (2) Detect TTY: let is_tty = std::io::stdin().is_terminal(); (use std::io::IsTerminal - stable in Rust 1.70+); (3) Call repl::run(&vfs, is_tty, &mut stdin, &mut stdout, &mut stderr). So repl::run signature becomes run(vfs: &Rc<RefCell<Vfs>>, is_tty: bool, stdin, stdout, stderr).
- repl.rs: (1) When is_tty: create rustyline::Editor::default() (or Editor::new()), set_helper(Some(DevShellHelper::new(vfs.clone()))), loop with prompt = format!("{} $ ", vfs.borrow().cwd()), match editor.readline(&prompt) { Ok(Some(line)) => { let line = line.trim(); ... parse and execute } Ok(None) => return Ok(()) Err(e) => write stderr, continue }. For execute_pipeline we need ExecContext { vfs: vfs.borrow_mut().deref_mut() } - use vfs.borrow_mut() to get &mut Vfs. (2) When !is_tty: keep existing read_line loop but get vfs from vfs.borrow_mut() at the start of each iteration for prompt and for ExecContext (so we need to restructure so we borrow_mut once per iteration for the non-TTY branch).
- Ensure ExecContext still receives &mut Vfs and the same stdin/stdout/stderr. For TTY branch stdin is still the same handle (for commands like "cat" that read stdin); pass it to ExecContext.

**Build and test:** cargo build && cargo test. Commit: git add src/completion.rs src/repl.rs src/main.rs && git commit -m "feat(repl): rustyline in TTY with path completion; read_line when not TTY"

Work directory: /home/ars/richard/2026/pvm_2/dev_shell
Report: changes, any borrow/lifetime issues fixed, build/test result, commit.
